IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (57667857.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced Human Resources professional with a strong background in talent acquisition and employee relations. Skilled in developing and implementing HR policies, conducting interviews, and managing recruitment processes.
SKILLS: ADA, advertisements, benefits, budgets, charts, competitive, counseling, databases, documentation, employee relations, firing, forms, hiring, human resources management, human resources, labor relations, legal, networking, organizing, organizational, performance appraisals, recruiting, research, safety, staffing, supervisory, employee development, employee handbooks

SOURCE: 57667857.pdf
JOB TITLE: Assistant Vice-President-Human Resources
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 02/1999 - 05/2012
DESCRIPTION: Worked closely with senior-level management to create fair and consistent HR policies and procedures. Developed and implemented recruiting strategies, conducted exit interviews, and facilitated year-end talent reviews.

SOURCE: 57667857.pdf
JOB TITLE: Human Resources-Recruiter
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 06/2014 - 05/2015
DESCRIPTION: Hired and interviewed a large number of applicants per month. Advised managers on organizational policy matters and directed personnel activities.

SOURCE: 57667857.pdf
JOB TITLE: Talent Attraction
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 09/2012 - 05/2014
DESCRIPTION: Conducted background checks and exit interviews. Developed recruiting strategies to meet staffing needs.
